title: tsuwts #6692
definition:
1) to blossom, shine, sparkle
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to flourish
        1a2) to shine, gleam
    1b) (Hiphil) to blossom, put forth blossoms, produce blossoms
 2) (Hiphil) to gaze, peep, glance, make the eyes sparkle
